title: Settings
subtitle: Make the dashboard yours: visible modules, language, mood.

modules.title: Account modules
modules.description: Choose what you want to see — or not — in your navigation. Hidden modules stay accessible here at any time.
modules.hiddenCount: {count, plural, =0 {All modules are visible} one {# module hidden} other {# modules hidden}}

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: The mood applies instantly, across the whole dashboard.

account.title: Account
account.description: Your role shapes what you see: an artist only sees themselves, a structure sees its whole roster.
